items.en: The result is shown in Figure X. Models between 0.6x and 2.2x the optimal size can be used with only a 20% increase in compute budget. Using a smaller model is useful when accounting for the cost inference. A larger model can be trained the the same level of performance in fewer steps, allowing for more parallelism and faster training if sufficient harware is available (see Figure Y):
items.zh: 结果如图X所示。使用0.6倍到2.2倍最优大小的模型，计算预算仅增加20%。在考虑推理成本时，使用较小的模型是有用的。较大的模型可以在更少的步数内训练到相同的性能水平，从而允许更多的并行性和更快的训练（如果有足够的硬件，见图Y）：

items.en: A 2.2x larger model requires 45% fewer steps at a cost of 20% more training compute. Note that this equation should not be trusted for very large models, as it is only valid in the power-law region of the learning curve after initial transient effects.
items.zh: 一个2.2倍大的模型需要减少45%的步数，但训练计算成本增加20%。注意，这个方程对于非常大的模型不应被信任，因为它仅在初始瞬态效应后的幂律区域有效。

items.en: In this section we list some potential caveats to our analysis.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们列出分析中一些潜在的注意事项。

items.en: At present we do not have a solid theoretical understanding for any of our proposed scaling laws. The scaling relations with model size and compute are especially mysterious. It may be possible to understand scaling at very large D𝐷D holding model size fixed [AS17], and also the shape of learning curves late in training, by modeling the loss with a noisy quadratic. But the scaling with D𝐷D at very large model size still remains mysterious. Without a theory or a systematic understanding of the corrections to our scaling laws, it’s difficult to determine in what circumstances they can be trusted.
items.zh: 目前，我们对我们提出的任何标度律都没有坚实的理论理解。模型大小和计算量的标度关系尤其神秘。通过使用噪声二次型对损失建模，可能可以理解在固定模型大小下非常大的D时的标度[AS17]，以及训练后期学习曲线的形状。但非常大模型大小下D的标度仍然神秘。没有理论或对我们标度律修正的系统理解，很难确定在什么情况下它们可以被信任。

items.en: We are not especially confident in the prediction of Bcrit​(L)subscript𝐵crit𝐿B_{\rm crit}(L) for values of the loss far outside the range we have explored. Changes in Bcritsubscript𝐵critB_{\rm crit} could have a significant impact on trade-offs between data parallelism and the number of serial training steps required, which would have a major impact on training time.
items.zh: 对于远超出我们探索范围的损失值，我们对B_crit(L)的预测并不特别有信心。B_crit的变化可能对数据并行性和所需串行训练步数之间的权衡产生显著影响，从而对训练时间产生重大影响。

items.en: We did not thoroughly investigate the small data regime, and our fits for L​(N,D)𝐿𝑁𝐷L(N,D) were poor for the smallest values of D𝐷D (where an epoch corresponded to only 404040 steps). Furthermore, we did not experiment with regularization and data augmentation. Improvements in these could alter our results, quantitatively or qualitatively.
items.zh: 我们没有彻底研究小数据区域，并且对于最小的D值（其中一个epoch仅对应40步），我们对L(N,D)的拟合效果较差。此外，我们没有尝试正则化和数据增强。这些方面的改进可能会定量或定性地改变我们的结果。

items.en: We used the estimated training compute C≈6​N​B​S𝐶6𝑁𝐵𝑆C\approx 6NBS, which did not include contributions proportional to nctxsubscript𝑛ctxn_{\rm ctx} (see Section 2.1). So our scalings with compute may be confounded in practice in the regime of very large nctxsubscript𝑛ctxn_{\rm ctx}, specifically where nctx≳12​dmodelgreater-than-or-equivalent-tosubscript𝑛ctx12subscript𝑑modeln_{\rm ctx}\gtrsim 12d_{\rm model}.
items.zh: 我们使用了估计的训练计算量C ≈ 6 N B S，其中未包含与n_ctx成比例的贡献（见第2.1节）。因此，在非常大的n_ctx区域，特别是n_ctx ≳ 12 d_model时，我们的计算标度在实践中可能会被混淆。

items.en: We tuned learning rates, and we experimented with learning rate schedules. But we may have neglected to tune some hyperparameter (e.g. intialization scale or momentum) that have an important effect on scaling.
items.zh: 我们调整了学习率，并尝试了学习率调度方案。但我们可能忽略了某些对缩放有重要影响的超参数（例如初始化尺度或动量）的调整。

items.en: The optimal choice of learning rate is sensitive to the target loss. When training close to convergence, it may be necessary to use a smaller learning rate to avoid divergences. But when conducting a short training run (eg due to compute limitations), it may be possible to use a larger learning rate. We did not experiment with higher learning rates for training runs that did not proceed to convergence.
items.zh: 学习率的最优选择对目标损失敏感。当训练接近收敛时，可能需要使用较小的学习率以避免发散。但在进行短时间训练（例如由于计算限制）时，可能可以使用较大的学习率。对于未收敛的训练，我们没有尝试更高的学习率。

items.capEn: Figure 16: Left: We characterize the step on which early stopping occurs, as a function of the extent of overfitting. The red line indicates a lower bound for early stopping that is derived in Section 5.3. Right: We display train and test loss for a series of 300M parameter models trained on different sized dataset sub-samples. The test loss typically follows that of a run done with unrestricted data until diverging. Note that the degree of overfitting (as compared to the infinite data limit) is significantly overestimated by Ltest−Ltrainsubscript𝐿testsubscript𝐿trainL_{\rm test}-L_{\rm train} (denoted by a black bar for each run).
items.capZh: 图16：左图：我们描述了早停发生的步数，作为过拟合程度的函数。红线表示第5.3节推导出的早停下界。右图：我们展示了一系列在大小不同的数据集子样本上训练的300M参数模型的训练和测试损失。测试损失通常遵循无限制数据运行的结果，直到发散。注意，过拟合程度（与无限数据极限相比）被L_test - L_train（每条运行用黑色条表示）显著高估。

items.capEn: Figure 17: We compare recurrent Transformers [DGV+18], which re-use parameters, to standard Transformers. Recurrent Transformers perform slightly better when comparing models with equal parameter count, but slightly worse when accounting for reuse and comparing per FLOP.
items.capZh: 图17：我们将循环Transformer [DGV+18]（重用参数）与标准Transformer进行比较。在参数数量相同的模型比较中，循环Transformer表现稍好，但在考虑重用并按FLOP比较时，表现稍差。

full.sec: D.1 Early Stopping and Test vs Train
full.secZh: D.1 早停与测试集对比训练集

items.en: In section 5.3 we described the result shown in Figure 16, which provides a prediction for a lower bound on the early stopping step. We also show the train and test loss for a given model size when training on different sized datasets.
items.zh: 在第5.3节中，我们描述了图16所示的结果，该结果提供了早停步数的下界预测。我们还展示了在大小不同的数据集上训练时，给定模型大小的训练和测试损失。

items.en: We compare the performance of standard Transformers to recurrent Transformers [DGV+18] in Figure 17. These models re-use parameters, and so perform slightly better as a function of N𝑁N, but slightly worse as a function of compute C𝐶C. We include several different different possibilities for parameter re-use.
items.zh: 我们在图17中比较了标准Transformer和循环Transformer [DGV+18]的性能。这些模型重用参数，因此作为N的函数表现稍好，但作为计算量C的函数表现稍差。我们包含了参数重用的几种不同可能性。

items.en: We measure the critical batch size using the data displayed in figure 18. This made it possible to estimate Bcrit​(L)subscript𝐵crit𝐿B_{\rm crit}(L) in figure 10.
items.zh: 我们使用图18显示的数据测量了临界批量大小。这使得我们能够估计图10中的B_crit(L)。

items.capEn: Figure 18: These figures demonstrate fits to Equation (5.1) for a large number of values of the loss L𝐿L, and for two different Transformer model sizes. These fits were used to measure Bcrit​(L)subscript𝐵crit𝐿B_{\rm crit}(L) for Figure 10.
items.capZh: 图18：这些图展示了对于大量损失L值和两种不同Transformer模型大小，对方程(5.1)的拟合。这些拟合用于测量图10中的B_crit(L)。

full.sec: D.4 Sample Efficiency vs Model Size
full.secZh: D.4 样本效率与模型规模

items.en: It is easy to see from figure 2 that larger models train faster, and are therefore more sample efficient. We provide another way of looking at this phenomenon in figure 19, which shows when different models reach various fixed values of the loss.
items.zh: 从图2中很容易看出，更大的模型训练更快，因此样本效率更高。我们在图19中提供了观察这一现象的另一种方式，该图显示了不同模型达到各种固定损失值的时刻。

items.capEn: Figure 19: The number of minimum serial steps needed to reach any fixed value of the test loss decreases precipitously with model size. Sample efficiency (show here for training far below the critical batch size) improves greatly as well, improving by a factor of almost 100 when comparing the smallest possible model to a very large one.
items.capZh: 图19：达到任何固定测试损失值所需的最小串行步数随模型大小急剧减少。样本效率（此处显示在远低于临界批量大小下训练）也大幅提高，将最小可能模型与非常大的模型相比，提高了近100倍。

items.capEn: Figure 20: This figure provides information about the performance per token as a function of model size and training time. Left: Loss per token as a function of its position T𝑇T in the 1024-token context. Loss scales predictably as a power-law in T𝑇T. Right: Test loss per token as a function of training step.
items.capZh: 图20：此图提供了关于每个token的性能随模型大小和训练时间变化的信息。左图：每个token的损失作为其在1024-token上下文中位置T的函数。损失随T呈幂律可预测地缩放。右图：每个token的测试损失作为训练步数的函数。

items.capEn: Figure 21: In addition to the averaged loss, individual tokens within the 1024-token context also improve smoothly as model size increases. Training runs with shorter context nctx=8subscript𝑛ctx8n_{\rm ctx}=8 (dashed lines) perform better on early tokens, since they can allocate all of their capacity to them.
items.capZh: 图21：除了平均损失外，1024-token上下文中的单个token也随模型大小增加而平滑改善。较短上下文n_ctx=8（虚线）的训练在早期token上表现更好，因为它们可以将所有容量分配给这些token。

items.en: The trends for loss as a function of model size are displayed for different tokens in the context in Figure 21. We see that models trained on nctx=1024subscript𝑛ctx1024n_{\rm ctx}=1024 show steady improvement with model size on all but the first token.
items.zh: 图21显示了不同上下文位置token的损失随模型大小的变化趋势。我们看到，在n_ctx=1024上训练的模型在所有token（除了第一个）上随模型大小稳步改善。

items.en: Fixing model size, it appears that the loss scales as a power-law as a function of position T𝑇T in the context, see Figure 20. This may be a consequence of underlying power-law correlations in language [EP94, ACDE12, LT16], or a more general feature of the model architecture and optimization. It provides some suggestion for the potential benefits (or lack thereof) from training on larger contexts. Not only do larger models converge to better performance at T=1024𝑇1024T=1024, but they also improve more quickly at early tokens, suggesting that larger models are more efficient at detecting patterns with less contextual information. In the right-hand plot we show how per-token performance varies for a fixed model as a function of the training step. The model begins by learning short-range information, and only learns longer-range correlations later in training.
items.zh: 固定模型大小，损失似乎随上下文位置T呈幂律缩放，见图20。这可能是语言中底层幂律相关性的结果[EP94, ACDE12, LT16]，或者是模型架构和优化的更一般特征。它为在更大上下文上训练的潜在好处（或缺乏）提供了一些启示。更大的模型不仅在T=1024时收敛到更好的性能，而且在早期token上改善更快，表明更大的模型在检测模式时更有效，即使上下文信息较少。在右图中，我们展示了固定模型下每个token性能随训练步数的变化。模型从学习短程信息开始，仅在训练后期学习长程相关性。

items.en: We have also included models trained with a tiny context nctx=8subscript𝑛ctx8n_{\rm ctx}=8 in order to compare with our longer context models. Even modestly sized models trained on nctx=8subscript𝑛ctx8n_{\rm ctx}=8 can dominate our largest nctx=1024subscript𝑛ctx1024n_{\rm ctx}=1024 models on very early tokens. This also suggests that further improvements should be possible with much larger models trained on large contexts.
items.zh: 我们还包含了在微小上下文n_ctx=8上训练的模型，以便与我们的长上下文模型进行比较。即使在n_ctx=8上训练的适度大小模型，在非常早期的token上也能胜过我们最大的n_ctx=1024模型。这也表明，通过在大上下文上训练更大的模型，应该可以实现进一步的改进。

items.capEn: Figure 22: We test a variety of learning rate schedules including cosine decay, linear decay, as well as other faster/slower decays schedules on a 3 million parameter model, shown on the left. For these experiments we do not decay to zero, since we find that this tends to give a fixed improvement close to the end of training. We find that, as long as the learning rate is not too small and does not decay too quickly, performance does not depend strongly on learning rate. Run-to-run variation is at the level of 0.05 in the loss, so averaging multiple runs is necessary to validate performance changes smaller than this level.
items.capZh: 图22：我们在一个300万参数的模型上测试了多种学习率调度方案，包括余弦衰减、线性衰减以及其他更快/更慢的衰减方案，如左图所示。在这些实验中，我们没有衰减到零，因为我们发现这往往会在训练结束时带来固定的改进。我们发现，只要学习率不是太小且衰减不是太快，性能对学习率的依赖并不强。运行之间的变化在损失上约为0.05，因此需要多次运行的平均来验证小于此水平的性能变化。

full.sec: D.6 Learning Rate Schedules and Error Analysis
full.secZh: D.6 学习率调度与误差分析

items.en: We experimented with a variety of learning rates and schedules. A host of schedules and resulting test performances for a small language model are plotted in Figure 22. We conclude that the choice of learning rate schedule is mostly irrelevant, as long as the total summed learning rate is sufficiently large, and the schedule includes a warmup period and a final decay to near-vanishing learning rate. Variations among schedules appear to be statistical noise, and provide a rough gauge for the scale of variation between different training runs. Experiments on larger models suggest that the variation in the final test loss between different random seeds is roughly constant in magnitude for different model sizes.
items.zh: 我们尝试了多种学习率和调度方案。图22绘制了一个小型语言模型的各种调度方案及相应的测试性能。我们得出结论，只要总学习率足够大，并且调度包含预热期和最终衰减到接近零的学习率，学习率调度的选择基本无关紧要。调度之间的变化似乎是统计噪声，并提供了不同训练运行之间变化规模的粗略估计。在更大模型上的实验表明，不同随机种子之间最终测试损失的变化幅度对于不同模型大小大致恒定。

items.en: We found that larger models require a smaller learning rate to prevent divergence, while smaller models can tolerate a larger learning rate. To implement this, the following rule of thumb was used for most runs:
items.zh: 我们发现，更大的模型需要更小的学习率以防止发散，而较小的模型可以容忍更大的学习率。为了实现这一点，大多数运行使用了以下经验法则：

items.en: We expect that this formula could be improved. There may be a dependence on network width, likely set by the initialization scale. The formula also breaks down for N>1010𝑁superscript1010N>10^{10} parameters. Nevertheless, we found that it works sufficiently well for the models we considered.
items.zh: 我们预计这个公式可以改进。可能存在对网络宽度的依赖，可能由初始化尺度决定。该公式在N>10^10参数时也会失效。尽管如此，我们发现它对我们考虑的模型效果足够好。

full.sec: D.7 Fit Details and Power Law Quality
full.secZh: D.7 拟合细节与幂律质量

items.capEn: Figure 23: The trend for performance as a function of parameter count, L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N), is fit better by a power law than by other functions such as a logarithm at a qualitative level.
items.capZh: 图23：性能随参数数量L(N)的变化趋势，在定性层面上，幂律拟合优于其他函数如对数拟合。

items.capEn: Figure 24: We show evaluations on a series of datasets for models with approximately 1.5 Billion parameters. We observe no effect of depth on generalization; generalization performance depends primarily on training distribution performance. The 12-layer model overfit the Internet Books dataset and we show the early-stopped performance; we have not seen this surprising result in other experiments.
items.capZh: 图24：我们展示了一系列数据集上约15亿参数模型的评估结果。我们观察到深度对泛化没有影响；泛化性能主要取决于训练分布上的性能。12层模型在互联网图书数据集上过拟合，我们展示了早停后的性能；在其他实验中我们未发现这一令人惊讶的结果。

items.en: We experimented with a number of functional forms for the fits to L​(N),L​(C)𝐿𝑁𝐿𝐶L(N),L(C), and L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D); the power-law fits were qualitatively much more accurate than other functions such as logarithms (see Figure 23).
items.zh: 我们尝试了多种函数形式来拟合L(N)、L(C)和L(D)；幂律拟合在定性上比对数等其他函数准确得多（见图23）。

items.en: For L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C), we do not include small models with only 1 layer in the fit, as the transition from 1 to 2 layers causes a noticable lump in the data. For L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) we also do not include very small models with only 1 layer in the fit, and we exclude the largest models that have not trained fully to convergence. Fit parameters change marginally if we do include them, and the trend extrapolates well in both directions regardless.
items.zh: 对于L(C)，我们在拟合中不包括仅含1层的小模型，因为从1层到2层的过渡在数据中造成了一个明显的凸起。对于L(N)，我们也不包括仅含1层的极小模型，并排除了尚未完全训练收敛的最大模型。如果包含它们，拟合参数变化很小，且趋势在两端都能很好地外推。

items.en: In figure 24 we show that generalization to other data distributions does not depend on network depth when we hold the total parameter count fixed. It seems to depend only on the performance on the training distribution.
items.zh: 在图24中，我们展示了当总参数数量固定时，向其他数据分布的泛化不依赖于网络深度。它似乎只取决于训练分布上的性能。
